mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_cart (count, create_time, last_edit_time, product_id, user_id) VALUES (#{count}, #{create_time}, #{last_edit_time}, #{product_id}, #{user_id}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE count = #{count}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.count, p.product_name, p.img_addr, p.normal_price, p.promotion_price, c.cart_id FROM tb_cart AS c LEFT JOIN tb_product AS p ON c.product_id = p.product_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId}
